[2018-03-25 05:22] .bky_1556 (bky): Today I learned a new, powerful strategy from Master Bot.
[2018-03-25 05:23] .bky_1556 (bky): It swindled me for 10+ gold value on or around turn 7.
[2018-03-25 05:23] .bky_1556 (bky): The strat is "fake breachproof".
[2018-03-25 05:24] .bky_1556 (bky): First you build some [[Thorium Reactor]]s.
[2018-03-25 05:24] .bky_1556 (bky): excuse me, [[Thorium Dynamo]]
[2018-03-25 05:25] f300xen (f0x): dynamo is good without breachproof tho
[2018-03-25 05:25] .bky_1556 (bky): Building all your drones into them.
[2018-03-25 05:25] .bky_1556 (bky): Then you build some gauss cannons
[2018-03-25 05:25] mtanzer: yeah master bot likes to do this thing where it lets you put 7 damage on a dynamo then it starts defending
[2018-03-25 05:26] .bky_1556 (bky): Then you allow your opponent to breach you and damage a dynamo for 4+, while *building blastforges*
[2018-03-25 05:26] .bky_1556 (bky): and go to defending after having absorbed a bunch for free with the dynamo.
[2018-03-25 05:26] mtanzer: it's not as good a strategy as it looks because with a wall you probably could've just absorbed 4 of that 7 damage, and the attacker doesn't have to put the damage on dynamo they can kill forge or conduit or something
[2018-03-25 05:26] xyotsuba: just got shredder+hannibull rushed when arms race is in the set...
[2018-03-25 05:26] mtanzer: and also the attacker has a lot of other options.  but still sometimes mbot gets away with some insane value doing this
[2018-03-25 05:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): yeah, bot had done that to me before
[2018-03-25 05:27] mtanzer: I remember losing to mbot doing that a few times before lol
[2018-03-25 05:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): ive lost games to it even (i usually dont lose to master bot)
[2018-03-25 05:27] mtanzer: it's something you need to be aware of and play around
[2018-03-25 05:27] .bky_1556 (bky): Yeah, the point is that tapping the dynamo is a trap and I'm better off killing a gauss cannon or something if there are blastforges under construction.
[2018-03-25 05:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): the ability to do it is the reason i think dynamo should be nerfed to 7 :Fragile:
[2018-03-25 05:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): because thorium on it's own is already a really good econ unit
[2018-03-25 05:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): i dont think it has to be good at both things
[2018-03-25 05:28] amalloy: masterbot just resigned an easy win because it forgot about clusterbolt
[2018-03-25 05:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): @bky the problem your first attack has to go to either the thorium or gauss. if it's gauss, they just go BP longer. if you tap the thorium, and bot builds forge, then assigning your damage to either is a mistake
[2018-03-25 05:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): they dont have to commit to forge until you get your first tap in on dynamo
[2018-03-25 05:29] mrguy888: Dynamo absorb is often the best way to play a set.
[2018-03-25 05:30] .bky_1556 (bky): The counterplay I have planned for next time I see it is to tap the dynamo for 2-ish.
[2018-03-25 05:31] .bky_1556 (bky): If it's acting like a wall, that's not as big a deal.
[2018-03-25 05:32] mrguy888: There really is no counterplay to it. It is just a good play.
[2018-03-25 05:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): ive seen master bot do dynamo absorb a lot, but i almost never see it in top level play
[2018-03-25 05:32] mrguy888: People are lazy masn
[2018-03-25 05:32] mrguy888: Gotta calculate that stuff
[2018-03-25 05:32] namington: yeah, master bot, being a computer, happens to be very good at math
[2018-03-25 05:33] mtanzer: I think it can be a good play sometimes but it also can be a bad play a lot of times
[2018-03-25 05:33] namington: hence why master bot is better at tactics than overall strategy
[2018-03-25 05:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): masterbot is especially good when there's just a bunch of vanilla stuff
[2018-03-25 05:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): like thunderhead, old bull, thorium
[2018-03-25 05:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): it seems to be pretty bad at finding lucina or odin lines
[2018-03-25 05:33] mrguy888: Thunderhead isn't vanilla. Does masterbot even like buying it?
[2018-03-25 05:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): well, more so bull than thunderhead
[2018-03-25 05:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think thunderhead would be good if the tech cost wasnt so heavy
[2018-03-25 05:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): since bot is really bad at heavy tech in general
[2018-03-25 05:34] masn6811 (Masne98888): like if there's 3 or more of the same color in a unit's icon, master bot sucks with it
[2018-03-25 05:34] .bky_1556 (bky): Bull used to be one of the bot's worst units.
[2018-03-25 05:35] .bky_1556 (bky): It'd hang out on 5-6 attack for a while and not spot that the player can respond to bull by immediately jumping to 7.
[2018-03-25 05:36] mtanzer: I've always found masterbot scariest in low econ tactical mirrors
[2018-03-25 05:36] mtanzer: stuff like grimbotch
[2018-03-25 05:36] .bky_1556 (bky): Get better at tactics, I guess. 😉
[2018-03-25 05:37] mtanzer: I maintain that I'm good at tactics but bad at doing tactics fast
[2018-03-25 05:37] masn6811 (Masne98888): ive found HavoCRusheR good at low econ red

[2018-03-25 13:15] crash_overlord: Pretty much always get them since they're on avg. > regular drone in certain positions. Just gotta figure out what those positions are. Say wild drone, it's just 1 gold cheaper than 2 drone, so it's almost always > regular drones if you'd buy 2 of them anyways.
[2018-03-25 13:16] crash_overlord: And 1 gold in prismata can be the difference between something being ok and something being broken, especially the earlier it is.
[2018-03-25 13:17] zugz: i just cant get over the bit where they kill your wild drone as soon as you're into the midgame
[2018-03-25 13:17] zugz: i know that wild drones are good but psychologically its hard to accept for me
[2018-03-25 13:17] steel0229e (Steel): @Namington I believe master bot is a lot stronger than all the casual bots, including the rush bots. Those rushes are very unsound at competetive play, while master bot at least makes semi-decent builds sometimes.
[2018-03-25 13:17] crash_overlord: I think the main thing there is to realize drones are bad units
[2018-03-25 13:18] steel0229e (Steel): by the time wild drones start to die it is already good to sell drones for damage, so you don't mind getting free 3 health tempo and get ahead in damage
[2018-03-25 13:19] steel0229e (Steel): the only times they are not good is when there is  a quick way to get to 3 dmg immediately
[2018-03-25 13:20] steel0229e (Steel): red rush does not count here as wild drone is perfect against red rushes
[2018-03-25 13:22] steel0229e (Steel): in my current understanding there are only 3 units that can punish wild drones. tesla, redeemer and p2 cynestra
[2018-03-25 13:22] zugz: i thought they would be worse in sets with big absorbers
[2018-03-25 13:23] zugz: less important to get a lightning fast start (id think?) and they can just pick off your wild drones as soon as you amke a defense grid or w/e
[2018-03-25 13:24] crash_overlord: If you're getting a lot of drones anyways
[2018-03-25 13:24] crash_overlord: then damage comes later
[2018-03-25 13:24] crash_overlord: and wild drones get better
[2018-03-25 13:25] crash_overlord: but they're also really good in super early game sets because they let you get 1-2 adittional drones in a rush. They're only really "bad" when there's a way to get to 3 damage exactly very fast.
[2018-03-25 13:25] crash_overlord: So something like a tesla
[2018-03-25 13:25] zugz: if we're so happy to trade our drones to save some damage then wouldn't that imply it'd be correct to just not click the wild drone
[2018-03-25 13:25] crash_overlord: Redemeer also interacts weirdly
[2018-03-25 13:26] crash_overlord: No, killing wild drone > killing 1 engy infront of a wall
[2018-03-25 13:26] crash_overlord: it gets close between killing 2 engineers infrot on rhino though
[2018-03-25 13:27] crash_overlord: if it's super low econ red mirror you probably kill 2 engineers > wild, if it's mid or higher econ you kill the wild because the defense is more easly replaceable and the drones are more valuable
[2018-03-25 13:27] awaclus: If you let the drone survive for 2 turns, that's enough money to replace the engis
[2018-03-25 13:28] awaclus: So you're just getting tempo
[2018-03-25 13:28] crash_overlord: But tempo is value :monkaS:
[2018-03-25 13:28] crash_overlord: If they have to buy 2 engineers instead of a tarsier you're gaining a tarsiers worth of value
[2018-03-25 13:29] crash_overlord: Its the exact reason tia is good
[2018-03-25 13:29] zugz: hooray, we hit master
[2018-03-25 13:29] zugz: dumpster master but ill take it anyway
[2018-03-25 13:32] zugz: pretty sure that means giant newbie
